title: Outlook Calendar Integration - Adds to todays date
excerpt: I’ve set up for one of my boards to integrate with my outlook calendar. The item has a start date and end date. However when it adds it to my outlook calendar it adds the event to today on my calendar. I can’t see how to…

posts.author: nicmcl-wabt (Nicola McLeod)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve set up for one of my boards to integrate with my outlook calendar. The item has a start date and end date. However when it adds it to my outlook calendar it adds the event to today on my calendar. I can’t see how to fix this as I have selected start date and end date when setting up the integration.

Any help is much appreciated as it is driving me mad!

posts.author: Seangugula (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml: Having the same issue here, did you find a solution?
